Wisconsin electrostatic generator.
MgF2 target, enriched in 24Mg, evaporated onto
graphite backings. Total energy loss in target 13 keV.
No information given on uncertainties except of: A
discrepancy of a factor of approximately three,
therefore, remains between the experimental results
and the theoretical prediction (the principle of
detailed balance), and this discrepancy is probably
due to errors in the determination of target thickness.
VM
